article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.7. 14801.Burnaby Procedure Bylaw 2024 Amendment Bylaw No.1 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Bylaw Would Change How Advisory Body Rules Are Set and Updated
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a bylaw amendment that would change who controls the rules (called 'Terms of Reference') for City advisory bodies — giving the Mayor, Council, and the City's top administrator the ability to request updates, with Council having final approval.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the final adoption vote — this affects how Burnaby's advisory bodies operate.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Procedure Bylaw 2024 Amendment No.1 — final adoption vote
